# NodeMeld

> NodeMeld is an indie SaaS discovery platform that indexes and surfaces profitable tools built by solo founders and small bootstrapped teams.

## What is NodeMeld?
NodeMeld (nodemeld.kryv.network) discovers and indexes indie SaaS products from r/SideProject, r/indiehackers, and bootstrapped founder communities. It is NOT for VC-backed startups — only small, profitable, real products built by real people.

## Core Features
- AI-powered SaaS discovery from indie founder communities
- Upvoting and community curation
- Category filtering: Productivity, Marketing, Development, Design, AI, Analytics
- Founder submission portal
- Multi-platform founder notifications

## Key URLs
- Platform: https://nodemeld.kryv.network
- Submit: https://nodemeld.kryv.network/submit
- API: https://nodemeld-api.kryv.workers.dev

## AI Crawler Permissions
GPTBot: Allow / Claude-Web: Allow / PerplexityBot: Allow

*Part of KRYV Network — kryv.network*
